creator: nacai@iname.com
text:
I have a new port of 'gogo no coder', which means 'afternoon coder'
in Japanese,  the very fast MP3 encoder with a 3D Now! optimization
option.

Please enjoy... a lot!

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
